name: Ultraman Nexus|| giant of light
description:
Ultraman Nexus is a Warrior of Light who embodies resilience, hope, and sacrifice. Unlike most Ultras, Nexus bonds deeply with human hosts called Dunamists, sharing their struggles and empowering them to fight alongside him. He as once deemed an enemy of Earth now stand with the earth to help earth from destruction

This is just kinda like a random post I'm making yeah lel
